name: CyberArk Identity
description: Monitor user access, MFA enrollment, and role-based access controls in CyberArk Identity (SSO/MFA)

credentialFields.label: Tenant URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your CyberArk Identity tenant URL, e.g. abc1234.id.cyberark.cloud (no https:// prefix)

credentialFields.label: OAuth2 Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: The Client ID from your OAuth2 Confidential Client application in CyberArk Identity

credentialFields.label: OAuth2 Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The Client Secret from your OAuth2 Confidential Client application

credentialFields.label: OAuth2 App ID
credentialFields.helpText: The OAuth2 application ID (used in the token endpoint path). Found in the app settings in Identity Administration.

credentialFields.label: OAuth2 Scope
credentialFields.helpText: OAuth2 scope (optional). Leave blank to use defaults.

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all users in CyberArk Identity directory to verify employee access management

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Checks MFA enrollment status for users in CyberArk Identity to ensure multi-factor authentication is configured

checks.name: Role-based Access Controls
checks.description: Reviews roles and administrative rights assignments in CyberArk Identity
